notes: Zero exempt verification modes: §8.1 forbids spine/critical-seam tests from exempt modes, and §9/INV-018 forbid code-seam tasks from exempt modes. Every task is automated-* / system-validation. Gate V4 (exemption review) has nothing to review.

system-validation (3 tasks: W2-2, W3-1, W5-2) is a fizzy-canonical verification_mode (spec §9, VALID_VERIFICATION_MODES) — NOT in the older 07-execution v2 enum; it is the prompt/doc + judgment tier mode and is NOT exempt. Scope: end-to-end. Realized via scoped skill runs (system-validation) + golden-case corpus (W1-5) for judgment-tier gates.
Doc-spine tests (US-13 TC-13.0, US-15 TC-15.1) are realized as automated-unit doc-lint pytests (grep assertions) rather than static-check, to satisfy §8.1's spine-not-exempt rule.
non_behavior_changing tasks (W5-1 glossary/ADR, W5-2 Getting Started doc, W5-3 dogfood fixture) are still verified (doc-lint pytest / system-validation / F′ integration) — none exempt.
Gate V3 blocking rule SATISFIED: unmapped_behavior_tasks is empty; validation_errors is empty.
